modmenu.descriptionTranslation.${mod_id}: Client-side Fabric mod that automatically hides HUD elements with customizable conditions and smooth animation.
${mod_id}.modmenu.title: Hudless
${mod_id}.modmenu.no_config_library_scre:
You need to install §6§lYet Another Config Lib [YACL]§f to open ${mod_name} Configuration Screen

§a§lOpen §6§lYACL §a§lModrinth page?
${mod_id}.modmenu.category.settings.name: General Settings
${mod_id}.modmenu.category.huds.name: HUD Elements
${mod_id}.modmenu.category.triggers.name: Trigger Conditions
${mod_id}.modmenu.option.enableMod.name: Enable Mod
${mod_id}.modmenu.option.enableFading.de: Apply a fade-out effect when hiding HUD elements.
${mod_id}.modmenu.option.visibleTicks.de: How long (in ticks) the HUD stays visible after a trigger.
${mod_id}.modmenu.option.hideSpeed.name: Hide Speed
${mod_id}.modmenu.option.hideSpeed.descr: Speed at which HUD elements move off-screen.
${mod_id}.modmenu.option.hideFadeSpeed.d: Speed at which HUD elements fade out.
${mod_id}.modmenu.option.maxY.name: Maximum Y Offset
${mod_id}.modmenu.option.maxY.descriptio: Highest Y offset (fully visible HUD position).
${mod_id}.modmenu.option.minY.name: Minimum Y Offset
${mod_id}.modmenu.option.triggerHotbar.d: Show HUD when switching hotbar slots.
${mod_id}.modmenu.option.triggerHunger.d: Show HUD when hunger level changes.
${mod_id}.modmenu.option.triggerArmor.de: Show HUD when armor value changes.
${mod_id}.modmenu.option.triggerAirBubbl: Show HUD when underwater air changes.
Show HUD when active potion effects change.
${mod_id}.modmenu.option.triggerMountHea: Show HUD when mount health changes.
${mod_id}.modmenu.option.triggerExperien: Show HUD when the player's experience bar changes.
${mod_id}.modmenu.option.hideHotbar.name: Hide Hotbar
${mod_id}.modmenu.option.hideChat.name: Hide Chat
${mod_id}.modmenu.option.hideStatusBar.d: Hide health, hunger, armor, air bubbles, mount health, etc.
${mod_id}.modmenu.option.hideProgressBar: Hide experience bar, jump bar, locator bar, etc.
